scriptsInfo.check:node: Fails early if Node is older than 22.
scriptsInfo.predev: Runs automatically before npm run dev.
scriptsInfo.prebuild: Runs automatically before npm run build.
scriptsInfo.prepreview: Runs automatically before npm run preview.
scriptsInfo.sync:version: Copies package.json version into native/app metadata.
scriptsInfo.sync:version:bump-code: Copies version and bumps Android versionCode.
scriptsInfo.dev: Starts the local Vite development server.
scriptsInfo.preview:host: Serves the production build on the local network.
scriptsInfo.prod:preview: Builds production files, then serves them with Vite preview.
scriptsInfo.android:copy: Builds web files and copies them into the Android project.
scriptsInfo.android:sync: Builds web files and syncs Capacitor Android plugins/config.
scriptsInfo.android:install: Builds, syncs Android, and installs the debug app on a connected device.
scriptsInfo.android:patch-version: Bumps package patch version and Android versionCode without making a git tag.
scriptsInfo.android:test-apk: Full APK test flow: bump version, build, sync Android, install debug app.

scripts.check:node:
node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 22) { console.error('
Node 22+ is required for sporely-web. Current: ' + process.version + '
Use nvm install 22 && nvm use 22
'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prod:preview: npm run build && npm run preview:host
scripts.android:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:install: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:installDebug
scripts.android:patch-version: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run sync:version:bump-code
scripts.android:test-apk: npm run android:patch-version && npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:installDebug
